name: Plaça de l'Ajuntament
description: The main square. Host to the daily Mascletà and the final Municipal Cremà.

name: Monteolivete Bridge
description: Primary location for the Night Fireworks (Castillos) and the grand Nit del Foc.

name: Plaza de la Virgen
description: The spiritual heart of the festival. Site of the Flower Offering (L'Ofrena).

name: Science Museum (Ninot)
description: Location of the Ninot Exhibition and where the Indultats are proclaimed.

name: Torres de Serranos
description: Historic gates where the Crida takes place and major parades pass through.
